2026-2027 Men's Basketball Roster

11 Hutson Rowe

  • Position G
  • Height 6-1
  • Weight 175
  • Class Redshirt Freshman
  • Hometown Gulf Breeze, Fla.
  • Highschool Gulf Breeze High School
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2026 GSC Academic Honor Roll

AS A FRESHMAN (2025–26): Appeared in seven games during his first collegiate season in which he redshirted… Averaged 2.0 points, 0.9 rebounds and 7.1 minutes per game… Finished with 14 points, six rebounds, six steals and four assists… Scored a season-high five points against AUM… Pulled down a season-best three rebounds against Clayton State and AUM… Distributed three assists against P.R.-Rio Piedras… Recorded four steals against P.R.-Mayaguez… Made one three-pointer against Pensacola Christian and AUM.

PREP: Graduate of Gulf Breeze High School.
 
PERSONAL: Majoring in Sports Management.
